jsonLd.title: Shiprocket is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
